prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Environmental Permitting Regulations which apply only to England and Wales. It does not apply to Scotland, as environmental regulations and permitting systems are managed separately by the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA) in Scotland.
